name: 7'x10' Border Area Rug Blue
description: Transform your living space with this charming 7'x10' Border Area Rug Blue. Crafted from polyester, it features a delightful floral pattern that adds a touch of elegance to any room. The low pile height ensures easy maintenance, while the cotton backing provides a sturdy foundation. Perfect for indoor use, this machine-made rug combines style and practicality, making it a delightful addition to your home decor.
